creator: gpalmer@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is (IMHO) an apache problem to do do with it's (re)start code, and 
unless the submitter has more info pointing to (say) a FreeBSD TCP 
problem, he should approach the Apache developers (www.apache.org). 

I think the only real fix is not to do server reloads/restarts :-(
